queries.question: Give me the traffic cameras and their functions.
queries.sql: select traffic_camera.name , function.functionname from Traffic_Camera_Function join Function on Traffic_Camera_Function.functionId = Function.id join Traffic_Camera on Traffic_Camera_Function.cameraId = Traffic_Camera.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?functionname WHERE {
  ?traffic_camera_function a :Traffic_Camera_Function .
  ?function a :Function .
  ?traffic_camera_function p:hasFunction ?function .
  ?traffic_camera a :Traffic_Camera .
  ?traffic_camera_function p:hasTraffic_Camera ?traffic_camera .
  ?traffic_camera p:name ?name .
  ?function p:name ?functionname .
}

queries.question: What is the common function that all traffic cameras offer?
queries.sql: SELECT Function.functionName  from Traffic_Camera_Function join Function on Traffic_Camera_Function.functionId = Function.id join Traffic_Camera on Traffic_Camera_Function.cameraId = Traffic_Camera.id   GROUP BY Traffic_Camera_Function.functionId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Traffic_Camera_Function.cameraId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Traffic_Camera)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the function that every traffic camera has.
